business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 premium with Nationwide; 13 claims; no cancellations

positives: 42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Formal written safety program in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Majority of work (60%) performed by own employees
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Certificates of insurance NOT required from all subcontractors before work begins
Hold-harmless agreements NOT obtained from all subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
LOC-005 (Cranberry Township warehouse) is not sprinklered
Prior carrier cancellation in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group)
Elevated claim frequency (13 claims in 2024, 10 in 2023)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024: Nationwide, premium $1,634,721.63, 13 claims, no cancellation. 2023: Berkshire Hathaway Guard, premium $1,476,849.96, 10 claims, no cancellation. 2022: Zurich Insurance Group, premium $1,369,245.71, 4 claims, cancelled.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. 425 full-time and 45 part-time employees; $95,000,000 annual revenue; hours of operation Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. 40% of work performed by subcontractors vs. own employees. Three largest projects completed in the past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition. Operations are performed above 4 stories.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Formal written safety program: Yes. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Certificates of insurance required from all subcontractors before work begins: No. Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors: No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Nationwide Insurance — $1,634,721.63 premium, 13 claims, no cancellation; 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard — $1,476,849.96 premium, 10 claims, no cancellation; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group — $1,369,245.71 premium, 4 claims, cancelled.
